title: Cam's CobbleVerse
description: Everything You'd Need In A Cobblemon Modpack
body:
![Cam's CobbleVerse Christmas Edition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e0b436e40c2a5238143e91bf4776065de9e5519.jpeg)

# All You Need In A Cobblemon Modpack

### **Why Play CobbleVerse?**
Cam's CobbleVerse is crafted for players who want the best possible Cobblemon experience: more features, more progression, smoother performance, and without it feeling over the top like most modpacks.

### Cobblemon+, Vanilla+, Server Ready
CBVS aims to take Cobblemon to the next level, giving players an adventure packed journey with new content, better performace, and enhanced gameplay.

### Play Your Way
Whether you're a casual trainer or a hardcore one, CobbleVerse gives you everything you need to create the best journey possible. With new forms of progression like Cobblemon Quests, trainers, and even mega evolutions theres always something to be working towards.

![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c60ff05c12b98f5353ea84b3c539fad7136b9d90.png)

### **Main Features**
- Vanilla+
- Smooth Animations
- Enhanced Visuals
- Trainers
- Legendary spawns
- Mega Evolutions
- Cobble Workers (Pokemon can harvest crops)
- Raids
- Ender Dragon Overhaul

![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c60ff05c12b98f5353ea84b3c539fad7136b9d90.png)

# ⚠️ NOTICE: INCREASE YOUR RAM ⚠️
### This modpack cannot run on the default 2GB of RAM. It will crash or lag significantly.
 - Minimum: **6 GB**
 - Recommended: **8 GB – 10 GB**

Please update your **"Java And Memory"** in the Modrinth App before launching!
